query: Analyze this CSV pipeline data: Deal Name, Stage, Amount, Close Date, Owner, Created Date. There are 10 deals across 3 reps.
expected_behavior: Computes total pipeline value, weighted pipeline value, and average deal sizes
Categorizes stuck deals based on overdue close dates and assigns stage-specific actions
Generates a multi-period forecast (this month, next month, quarterly)
Renders an interactive React-based dashboard outline with Overview, Stages, At-Risk, Forecast, Reps, and Velocity tabs
Bans the use of em dashes in the output report
